Source   Edit  

Colonization Engine

Colony establishment per operations.md:6.2.13

Colonization rules:

  • Requires ETAC ship with PTU
  • One system can only have one colony (any house)
  • New colonies start at infrastructure level 1
  • Awards +5 prestige for establishing colony
Colonization

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/planets, ../prestige, ../config/prestige_config, ../config/prestige_multiplier, ../economy/types, ../gamestate

Types

ColonizationAttempt = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  systemId*: SystemId
  fleetId*: FleetId
  ptuUsed*: int
Attempt to colonize a planet Source   Edit   
ColonizationResult = object
  success*: bool
  reason*: string
  newColony*: Option[Colony]
  prestigeEvent*: Option[PrestigeEvent]
Result of colonization attempt Source   Edit  

Procs

proc attemptColonization(attempt: ColonizationAttempt;
                         existingColonies: seq[Colony];
                         planetClass: PlanetClass; resources: ResourceRating): ColonizationResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc canColonize(systemId: SystemId; existingColonies: seq[Colony]): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if system can be colonized (no existing colony) Per operations.md:6.2.13 Source   Edit   
proc establishColony(houseId: HouseId; systemId: SystemId;
                     planetClass: PlanetClass; resources: ResourceRating;
                     startingPTU: int): ColonizationResult {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Establish new colony at system Per operations.md:6.2.13: "New colonies start at Level I" Source   Edit   
proc initNewColony(systemId: SystemId; owner: HouseId; planetClass: PlanetClass;
                   resources: ResourceRating; startingPTU: int): Colony {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Initialize a new colony with all required fields Replaces econ_types.initColony with full gamestate Colony initialization Source   Edit
